title: Joyreal Baby Toys 0-6 Months, 10pcs Newborn Sensory Toys Set, Baby Musical Caterpillar Toys, Rattles, Ribbons, Baby Essentials Sensory Box, Newborn Gifts for 3 6 9 12 Months
features: 【Baby Sensory Toys】Our sensory toy set includes 10 PCS, 1 multifunctional caterpillar doll, 2 wrist rattles, 1 wooden ribbon ring, 1 plush rattle, 1 rainmaker, 2 textured balls, 1 light-up ball, 1 storage bag. Our newborn toys offer more accessories than other toys. These colorful baby montessori toys are perfect for tummy time and can be used as car seat toys, stroller toys, and crib toys.

【Sensory Musical Toys】The caterpillar toy has musical sounds at the head and rattles at the tail. Various materials are used in the middle of the caterpillar to let the baby feel different touches, and there is also a mirror for self-identification. It has a 20 inch ruler on the back for parents to measure the baby's height.

【Newborn Sensory Toys】 These sensory toys for infants 0-12 months promotes baby's visual stimulation, brain development, tactile cognition, and auditory congnition. It also improves baby's hand-eye coordination and grasping ability. Our colorful toys are suitable for parent-child interactive games and can be used as montessori toys and baby sensory toys, to promote the visual development and color perception of babies after 3 months of age.

【Convenient to Store and Safe for Babies】 These baby stuff comes with a storage bag so you can store the toys together in the bag and take them home or outdoors. This will keep your home neat and clean. These baby toys are made of sturdy materials that are non-toxic, washable, firmly stitched and durable. Absolutely safe toys for babies.

【Perfect Gifts for Newborn】 As a perfect newborn toy gift to the new parents, also could be stocking fillers or christmas, birthday gifts for 0-12 months girls and boys. The perfect sensory toys for babies over 0 months to help them grow up healthy.
description: Product Description Baby Sensory Toys aterpillar Sensory Toys Colorful Sensory Toys Black and White Sensory Toys Accessories 10 PCS Accessories 15 PCS Accessories 13 PCS Color Colorful Color Colorful Color Black and White Applicable Month 0-36 Months Applicable Month 0-36 Months Applicable Month 0-12 Months Features 4 in 1 Caterpillar Toy Features Color Perception for 3 Months+ Features Newborn Sensory Exploration
